values.name: Wellness Exam
values.description: Comprehensive annual health check covering physical examination, vaccinations review, parasite screening, and personalised health advice for your pet.
values.description_zh: 全面的年度健康檢查，涵蓋理學檢查、疫苗接種評估、寄生蟲篩檢，以及為您的寵物量身打造的健康建議。

values.name: Vaccinations
values.description: Core and lifestyle vaccinations to keep your pet protected against preventable diseases. We tailor the vaccination schedule to your pet's age, breed, and lifestyle.
values.description_zh: 核心與生活型態疫苗，保護您的寵物免於可預防的疾病。我們會依寵物的年齡、品種與生活型態量身規劃接種時程。

values.name: Dental Cleaning
values.description: Professional teeth cleaning under anaesthesia to remove plaque and tartar buildup, preventing periodontal disease and improving overall health.
values.description_zh: 在麻醉下進行專業潔牙，清除牙菌斑與牙結石堆積，預防牙周病並提升整體健康。

values.name: Emergency Care
values.description: 24/7 emergency and critical care services for life-threatening situations. Our team is always ready to provide immediate, life-saving treatment.
values.description_zh: 提供全年無休的緊急與重症照護，因應危及生命的狀況。我們的團隊隨時待命，提供即時的救命治療。

values.name: Spay & Neuter
values.description: Safe, routine surgical procedures to prevent unwanted pregnancies and reduce the risk of certain cancers and behavioural issues.
values.description_zh: 安全的常規手術，預防非預期懷孕，並降低特定癌症與行為問題的風險。

values.name: Orthopaedic Surgery
values.description: Specialist surgery for bone and joint conditions including fractures, cruciate ligament tears, and hip dysplasia in dogs and cats.
values.description_zh: 針對骨骼與關節疾病的專科手術，包含骨折、十字韌帶斷裂，以及犬貓的髖關節發育不良。

values.name: Dermatology Consultation
values.description: Expert diagnosis and management of skin conditions, allergies, and coat disorders. Includes allergy testing and long-term treatment planning.
values.description_zh: 專業診斷與管理皮膚疾病、過敏與被毛問題，包含過敏原檢測與長期治療計劃。

values.name: Digital X-Ray
values.description: High-resolution digital radiography for accurate diagnosis of bone, joint, chest, and abdominal conditions with immediate results.
values.description_zh: 高解析度數位放射攝影，準確診斷骨骼、關節、胸腔與腹部狀況，並可即時取得結果。

values.name: Ultrasound Imaging
values.description: Non-invasive diagnostic imaging to evaluate internal organs, detect tumours, assess pregnancy, and guide biopsies or aspirates.
values.description_zh: 非侵入性的影像診斷，用於評估內臟器官、偵測腫瘤、判斷懷孕，以及引導切片或抽吸。

values.name: Nutrition Counselling
values.description: Personalised dietary assessment and nutritional guidance to optimise your pet's weight, energy, and long-term health outcomes.
values.description_zh: 個人化的飲食評估與營養指導，協助優化您寵物的體重、活力與長期健康。
